signals.headline: SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Scheduled | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC has scheduled a regulatory roundtable for April 16, 2026 (tomorrow) to discuss the CLARITY Act and options market structure.[1][4] This is a confirmed event that could provide regulatory clarity for XRP and Solana, though the outcome remains uncertain.

signals.headline: XRP Receives Largest Weekly Inflows Since December | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Receives Largest Weekly Inflows Since December | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP recorded $119.6 million in inflows last week, marking its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025.[5] This represents concrete capital movement into the asset ahead of regulatory discussions.

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders as of April 14, 2026, with daily non-vote transactions reaching historic highs of 148 million.[3] The network's Alpenglow consensus upgrade is anticipated to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds.[3]
